OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: Competency_SaveAssessmentResponse

childElements.name: DM_UpdateClinician
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%AssessmentName%==\"Clinician Profile Updates\"", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "MAILING_STREET" : "%Step1:UpdateMyInformation:MAILING_STREET%", "MAILING_CITY" : "%Step1:UpdateMyInformation:MAILING_CITY%", "MAILING_STATE" : "%Step1:UpdateMyInformation:MAILING_STATE%", "MAILING_ZIP" : "%Step1:UpdateMyInformation:MAILING_ZIP%", "PAYROLL_ADDRESS_STREET" : "=IF(%Step1:UpdateMyInformation:MAILING_ADDRESS_SAME_AS_PAYROLL_ADDRESS%,%Step1:UpdateMyInformation:MAILING_STREET%,%Step1:UpdateMyInformation:PAYROLL_ADDRESS_STREET%)", "PAYROLL_ADDRESS_CITY" : "=IF(%Step1:UpdateMyInformation:MAILING_ADDRESS_SAME_AS_PAYROLL_ADDRESS%,%Step1:UpdateMyInformation:MAILING_CITY%,%Step1:UpdateMyInformation:PAYROLL_ADDRESS_CITY%)", "PAYROLL_ADDRESS_STATE" : "=IF(%Step1:UpdateMyInformation:MAILING_ADDRESS_SAME_AS_PAYROLL_ADDRESS%,%Step1:UpdateMyInformation:MAILING_STATE%,%Step1:UpdateMyInformation:PAYROLL_ADDRESS_STATE%)", "PAYROLL_ADDRESS_ZIP" : "=IF(%Step1:UpdateMyInformation:MAILING_ADDRESS_SAME_AS_PAYROLL_ADDRESS%,%Step1:UpdateMyInformation:MAILING_ZIP%,%Step1:UpdateMyInformation:PAYROLL_ADDRESS_ZIP%)", "PROFESSIONAL_TITLE" : "%Step1:UpdateMyInformation:PROFESSIONAL_TITLE%", "MAIDEN_PREVIOUS_FORMER_NAME" : "%Step1:UpdateMyInformation:MAIDEN_PREVIOUS_FORMER_NAME%", "MOBILE" : "%Step1:UpdateMyInformation:MOBILE%", "DEA_STATE" : "%Step1:DEAInformation:DEA_STATE%", "DEA_NUMBER" : "%Step1:DEAInformation:DEA_NUMBER%", "ISSUE_DATE" : "%Step1:DEAInformation:ISSUE_DATE%", "SSN" : "%Step1:UpdateMyInformation:SSN%", "ContactId" : "%AssessmentDetails:AE_ContactId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "LoadClinicianDetailsIntakeForm", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DRE_AssessmentEnvelope
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "AssessmentEnvelopeItemId" : "=%AssessmentEnvelopeItemId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "AssessmentDetails", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DMGETAssessmentEnevelope", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: SaveResponses
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "omniProcessId" : "%omniProcessId%", "omniscriptId" : "%omniscriptId%", "Step1" : "%Step1%", "ContextId" : "%AssessmentDetails:AE_RequestReferenceId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "remoteClass" : "discoveryfrmwrk.StoreResponses", "remoteOptions" : { "Assessment.Name" : "%AssessmentName%", "Assessment.AccountId" : "%AssessmentDetails:AE_AccountId%", "Assessment.ContactId" : "%AssessmentDetails:AE_ContactId%", "Assessment.AssessmentEnvelopeId__c" : "%AssessmentEnvelopeItemId%", "Assessment.Type" : "Intake Form", "Assessment.AssessmentStatus" : "Completed" }, "remoteMethod" : "invokeMethod", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "RemoteAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "linkToExternalObject" : "", "trackingCustomData" : { }, "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "labelSingular" : "", "labelPlural" : "", "description" : "", "nameColumn" : "", "rollbackOnError" : false, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "ttlMinutes" : 5, "mockResponseMap" : { } }
